remarks: Welcome to The Maritime, a modern luxury high-rise in the heart of SoNo. This bright, lightfilled 2 bedroom, 2 bath condo is movein ready. Enjoy the floortoceiling windows, open layout, spacious bedrooms including large walk in closets, a contemporary kitchen with stainless steel appliances, including a GE refrigerator with ice and water dispenser, in sink garbage disposal, a new Bosch dishwasher and GE microwave. Terrazzo tile bathroom floors with Kohler fixtures, programmable Nest thermostat, automatic black out window shades, and a pantry with a thoughtfully designed custom California Closet system to add space and convenience. The living and dining area open to your private balcony, where you can relax and look out over the harbor with unobstructed views of the harbor and Long Island Sound.  The Maritime offers great amenities, including a gym, TV and rec room with a pool table and kitchenette, conference room, and garage parking. The petfriendly building sits on a treelined street just a short walk to the train for a quick commute to NYC, as well as, the vibrant shops and restaurants on Washington Street, the waterfront, the Maritime Aquarium, and the SoNo Collection mall, so everyday errands and nights out are incredibly easy and fun! The condo comes with two parking spots: one in the attached gated garage and one in the outdoor lot.
